== Notes for [[Item:Q111824|Q111824]] ==

==Fernão Peres de Guimarães==

* Birth circa 1150

Fernão Peres de Guimarães (? - 1178 ) was Lord of Melo , nobleman and medieval knight of the Kingdom of Portugal .

==Family==

He was the son of Pero Fromarigues de Guimarães , married with Usco Godins de Lanhoso, daughter of Godinho Fafes de Lanhoso and Ouroana Mendes de Riba Douro, from whom he had:

* D. Martim Fernandes de Riba de Vizela , married to D. Estevainha Soares da Silva, daughter of Soeiro Pires da Silva and Fruilhe Viegas de Lanhoso.
* João Fernandes de Riba de Vizela married twice, the first with Marinha Moniz Varela and the second with D. Maria Soares de Sousa, daughter of Soeiro Mendes de Sousa .

==Sources ==

Chronology of the Iberian Peninsula (379-1500) - https://www.ricardocosta.com/cronologia-da-peninsula-iberica-379-1500

Gayo, Manuel José da Costa Felgueiras , Nobiliary of the Families of Portugal, Carvalhos de Basto, 2nd Edition,
Braga, 1989. vol. VI-pg. 683 (Melos).

Ribadouro and Pacheco - http://www.soveral.info/mas/Ribadouro%20e%20Pacheco.htm

Ribadouro and Pacheco (10th to 13th centuries) Origin of the Fonseca, the Soveral, the Alvellos and another extinct Soveral family, Brief outline under construction - http://www.soveral.info/mas/Ribadouro%20e%20Pacheco.htm

Wikipedia - Fernão Peres de Guimarães - https://pt.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fern%C3%A3o_Peres_de_Guimar%C3%A3es

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
